page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. This instance features 8 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing a total of 8 vCPUs. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

A key characteristic of this instance is its bundled local storage, consisting of a 1919 GB SSD. This high-capacity local storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the integration of substantial local SSD storage alongside dedicated CPU resources and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio provides a dense hardware profile. This design reduces the need for external block storage attachments, optimizing resource density for data-intensive operations.

Given the combination of dedicated Intel Xeon processing cores, a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and nearly 2 TB of local SSD storage, the ecs.i5.2xlarge is structured for storage-heavy and database workloads. It is suitable for hosting relational databases, NoSQL databases, caching layers, and data-intensive applications that require low-latency local storage access and consistent CPU performance without hyperthreading interference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.2xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz. It features 8 physical cores with 1 thread per core, delivering 8 dedicated vCPUs alongside 64.0 GB of RAM. A defining feature of this instance is its integrated 1919 GB local SSD storage, which is complemented by a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance offers a high-density hardware profile that balances dedicated compute performance with substantial local storage capacity. This configuration is highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring direct access to fast local storage without the overhead of external network-attached volumes. The ecs.i5.2xlarge is optimized for database hosting, caching layers, and data-intensive applications.
